title: TF2 Secondary Font
description: TF2 Secondary font from Team Fortress 2, provided in TrueType format. Supports Caxton.
body:
This resource pack brings **TF2 Secondary** font from Team Fortress 2.

Works on 1.13+.

# Recommendations
**Use version 1.20.5+ on Vanilla** for correct font line height.

**Use version 1.19.2+ with Caxton** for correct font line height.

Use [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) mod for **smooth, high quality font rendering**.
Also it allows modifying the text shadow to ensure it is correctly offset.
Falls back to default rendering if not installed.

# Comparison - without and with Caxton

# Credit
This resource pack uses the TF2 Secondary font from Team Fortress 2. The font is included in the official TF2 DIY Kit released by Valve. All rights belong to Valve.
